expected_band: real hourly air quality; daily cycle + heavy-tailed pollution spikes

engine.model: forecasting method ladder: classical numpy (seasonal-naive, SES, Holt, Holt-Winters, Theta; live-capable) + statistical (AutoARIMA, AutoETS, AutoTheta via statsforecast; offline, when installed)

provenance.citation: Liang, X. et al. (2015). Beijing PM2.5 Data. UCI ML Repository.

flags.flag: timestamps not strictly increasing (sorted on ingest); 35 value(s) with robust |z| > 8
